briefing.main.text: Your daily briefing — curated signals across geopolitics, finance, and technology. Use the category filters to focus, or read straight through.

curator.archive.text: Your reading history — articles you've opened or saved. Use it to revisit stories or track what you've been following.

curator.scans-dives.text: Quick pass through today's top stories — scored and ranked. Click into any article to go deeper.

portuguese.landing.text: Meu Português pulls live articles from Brazilian and European Portuguese sources daily. Start in Leitura to read, or jump to Conversas to practice with a persona.

portuguese.leitura.text: Best on desktop — read, hover to translate, and save words to Palavras in one flow. On mobile, tap and hold to translate.

portuguese.leitura.article.text: Hover a word for a quick translation. Hit '+ Em Palavras' to save it to your vocabulary. Use Notas to write a reaction in Portuguese — then hit Corrigir for feedback.

portuguese.conversas.text: For the best voice experience, copy the prompt and use it in Grok, Claude, Gemini, or ChatGPT on your phone — native apps have faster, more natural voice. In-app voice works but has more latency due to API calls.

portuguese.escrita.text: Best on desktop for the full correction experience. On mobile, dictate into the text field and submit — Corrigir works the same way.

portuguese.palavras.text: Words saved from Leitura, Conversas, and Escrita all land here. Filter by origin or status, add words manually, or export to Anki. Switch to Treino mode to drill what you've saved.

portuguese.arquivo.text: Your full history — past conversations, writing sessions, and reading. Use it to track consistency and revisit sessions worth reviewing.

german.landing.text: Mein Deutsch pulls live German articles daily, focused on Vienna and Austria. Start in Lesen to read, or go to Gespräche to practice with a Vienna persona.

german.lesen.text: Best on desktop — read, hover to translate, and save words to Wörter in one flow. On mobile, tap and hold to translate.

german.lesen.article.text: Hover a word to translate it. Save words to Wörter with one click. Use the notes field to write a reaction in German — Corrigir gives you feedback on what you wrote.

german.gesprache.text: For the best voice experience, copy the prompt and use it in Grok, Claude, Gemini, or ChatGPT on your phone — native apps have faster, more natural voice. In-app voice works but has more latency due to API calls.

german.schreiben.text: Best on desktop for the full correction experience. On mobile, dictate into the text field and submit — Corrigir works the same way.

german.woerter.text: Your German vocabulary saved from Lesen. Filter by origin or status, export to Anki, or switch to Treino mode to drill what you've saved.

german.archiv.text: Full history of your German sessions — conversations, writing, and reading. Useful for tracking consistency and revisiting good sessions.
